description: A premium trading journal for active daytraders, offering advanced analytics, backtesting, and performance tracking.
target_audience: Futures and Crypto traders making 10-30 trades per day.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer aktive Daytrader. Dark theme, Electric Blue und Magenta Akzente. Inspiriert von Tradezella und Linear.app. Features: P&L Analytics per Strategy, Win-Rate per Setup, Entry/Exit Timing Heatmap, Backtesting, Equity Curve. Zielgruppe: Futures und Crypto Trader mit 10-30 Trades/Tag. Pricing: Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo.
